def positive_data_mapper_contains_business_decision_tree():
    rule_id = "data_mapper_contains_business_decision_tree"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag mappers or adapters that choose policy outcomes while converting data."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
